## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding new hires and discussing company operations, tools, and upcoming improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Extensive onboarding improvements planned for rollout over the weekend, including Slack cleanup, Linear implementation, and clearer role definitions](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Unlimited PTO policy with emphasis on responsible use and communication](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [$10k referral bonus for engineers, $5k for other roles who stay 6+ months](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Company in rapid growth phase; many processes and structures still being developed](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Topics

### Current Onboarding Challenges

  - [New hires experiencing information overload with numerous documents and videos](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Some facing technical issues with tools like Fathom for accessing training materials](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Notion documentation extensive but not well-organized by role, causing confusion](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Upcoming Onboarding Improvements

  - [Slack cleanup to clarify channel purposes and auto-add new hires to relevant channels](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Creation of dedicated onboarding channel for each cohort](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Implementation of Linear for project management, integrating with Slack](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Development of structured 12-week onboarding checklist in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Clearer role descriptions and org chart to be released next week](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Tool Access and Expenses

  - [1Password TeamVault as first stop for shared tool accounts](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Wits assisting with tool access for customer-facing team](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - ["Freedom and responsibility" expense policy; spend company money to do your job better](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Directors to receive vendor cards for tool purchases](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### PTO and Work Hours

  - [Unlimited vacation policy; 1-2 weeks notice preferred for longer breaks](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Employees encouraged to take national holidays of their country](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with Pacific Time Zone morning recommended for global collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Referral Program

  - [$10,000 bonus for referring hired engineers (6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [$5,000 bonus for referring other hired roles (6-month retention)](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Google form available for submitting referrals](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Company Culture and Growth

  - [Emphasis on first-principles thinking in designing company processes](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Openness to employee feedback and ideas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of rapid growth and ongoing development of structures](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Watch for rollout of new onboarding improvements over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Expect clearer role descriptions and org chart next week](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Familiarize with Linear once implemented for project management](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Reach out to Bridget or team leads with any questions or feedback on onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/rtyzxK2n3CPDhDxXUduU6Kb2zkvMkx77?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)
